privileged_info_summary: The task document_physical_exam@1 uses a synthetic electronic health record with patient Robert Thompson (PID 99) and encounter ID 200. The patient was born on 07/22/1958. The encounter is a routine office visit with the chief complaint 'Routine health maintenance examination,' logged in by Dr. James Carter (username: demo_provider). The physical examination findings to be documented include General findings (well-developed, well-nourished, alert, oriented, no acute distress), HEENT findings (normocephalic, pupils reactive, oropharynx clear), Neck findings (supple, no lymphadenopathy, no thyromegaly, no JVD), Cardiovascular findings (regular rate and rhythm, normal S1 and S2), Lungs findings (clear to auscultation, no wheezes or rales), and Abdomen findings (soft, non-tender, non-distended, normoactive bowel sounds). All metadata claims are directly verifiable from the task setup scripts and task description.
